summary: Full re-validation testing of Star Citizen Fleet Manager - Iteration 35. All major features working correctly. 23/24 backend API tests passed (1 timeout on /api/gear/weapons due to slow external API), all 13 frontend pages verified working with Playwright.

minor.issue: Timeout on first request (30s) due to external CStone API data fetch - works on retry with longer timeout

issues: Shows 'Loading vehicles...' briefly before data loads - normal API latency behavior

critical_code_review_comments: All 13 frontend pages load and display data correctly
All backend APIs return valid responses with proper structure
Navigation system works with proper active state highlighting
Fleet toggle in Loadout Builder correctly filters between All Ships (180) and My Fleet (11)
Dashboard color coordination with manufacturer colors is working
Community loadouts page shows shared loadouts with View/Copy functionality

success_rate.backend: 96% (23/24 tests passed - 1 timeout on slow endpoint)

seed_data_creation: Used existing fleet data for user 'newpilot' with 11 ships
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full re-validation complete. All features working. User 'newpilot' has 11 ships in fleet totaling 90.5M aUEC. Dashboard shows Aegis Dynamics as favorite (27%). All 13 nav pages verified: Dashboard, My Fleet, Ships (180), Vehicles, Components (270), Weapons, Compare, Loadout Builder, Community, Routes (star map), Gear (FPS weapons/armor/equipment), Wikelo (34 contracts), Prices (496 tracked items). Backend APIs all functional with minor latency on /api/gear/weapons.
